<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>Bundled Page</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: #F6DCE1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }
    #__bundler_loading { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; font: 13px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: #666; background: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); z-index: 10000; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #F6DCE1; z-index: 9999; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    #__bundler_placeholder { color: #999; font-size: 14px; }
  </style>
  <noscript>
    <style>#__bundler_loading { display: none; }</style>
    <div style="position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;font:13px/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;color:#999;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);z-index:10000;">
      This page requires JavaScript to display.
    </div>
  </noscript>

  <div id="__bundler_thumbnail">

  <div id="__bundler_loading">Unpacking...</div>

  <script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }

  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
  }, true);

  try {
    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
      return;
    }

    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);

    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');

    const blobUrls = {};
    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
      const entry = manifest[uuid];
      try {
        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);

        let finalBytes = bytes;
        if (entry.compressed) {
          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
            writer.write(bytes);
            writer.close();
            const chunks = [];
            let totalLen = 0;
            while (true) {
              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
              if (done) break;
              chunks.push(value);
              totalLen += value.length;
            }
            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
            let offset = 0;
            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
          } else {
            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
          }
        }

        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([], { type: entry.mime }));
      }
    }));

    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
    const resourceMap = {};
    for (const entry of extResources) {
      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
    }

    setStatus('Rendering...');
    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);

    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');

    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
      ';</' + 'script>';
    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
    if (headOpen) {
      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
    }

    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
    for (const old of dead) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
      s.textContent = old.textContent;
      // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags
      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
        const r = await fetch(s.src);
        s.textContent = await r.text();
        s.removeAttribute('src');
      }
      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
      old.replaceWith(s);
      if (p) await p;
    }
    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
  }
});

  </script>

U+0400-045F, U+0490-0491, U+04B0-04B1, U+2116;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Mulish';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 900;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"56302873-9184-45ae-be4d-8168af46ad63\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, url(\"53bcf1e2-916b-430b-b2e3-29de0c3161a2\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Mulish';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 900;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"af47c080-1097-4542-b5ab-fe269f534115\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<style>\n  * { box-sizing: border-box; }\n  html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; }\n  ::placeholder { color: #a39bb0; }\n  input:focus, textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: #8E95C9 !important; }\n<\u002Fstyle>\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<\u002Fhelmet>\n\n<div style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; background: #F6DCE1; color: #4A4560; min-height: 100vh; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\">\n\n  <nav style=\"position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px 40px; background: rgba(246,220,225,0.86); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.12);\">\n    <div onclick=\"{{ goHome }}\" style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; cursor: pointer;\">\n      <svg width=\"34\" height=\"34\" viewBox=\"0 0 40 40\" fill=\"none\" aria-label=\"Pebble logo\">\n        <ellipse cx=\"20\" cy=\"29\" rx=\"16\" ry=\"5.5\" stroke=\"#8FB08C\" stroke-width=\"1.7\" opacity=\"0.7\"><\u002Fellipse>\n        <ellipse cx=\"20\" cy=\"29\" rx=\"10.5\" ry=\"3.6\" stroke=\"#8E95C9\" stroke-width=\"1.7\"><\u002Fellipse>\n        <ellipse cx=\"20\" cy=\"29\" rx=\"5\" ry=\"1.8\" stroke=\"#5C63A6\" stroke-width=\"1.7\"><\u002Fellipse>\n        <circle cx=\"20\" cy=\"11.5\" r=\"5.2\" fill=\"#36324F\"><\u002Fcircle>\n      <\u002Fsvg>\n      <span style=\"font-family: Poppins; font-weight: 700; font-size: 26px; color: #36324F; letter-spacing: -0.01em\">Pebble<\u002Fspan>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 30px;\">\n      <sc-for list=\"{{ navItems }}\" as=\"item\" hint-placeholder-count=\"4\">\n        <a onclick=\"{{ item.onClick }}\" style=\"{{ item.style }}\">{{ item.label }}<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fsc-for>\n      <a onclick=\"{{ goProfile }}\" style=\"text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 999px;\">Your account<\u002Fa>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fnav>\n\n  <!-- ===================== HOME ===================== -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isHome }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n  <main data-screen-label=\"Home\">\n    <section style=\"max-width: 1120px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 72px 40px 40px; text-align: center;\">\n      <span style=\"display: inline-block; background: #F6EEDF; border: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); color: #36324F; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 7px 16px; border-radius: 999px;\">THE TRUE WAY OF MAKING FRIENDS<\u002Fspan>\n      <h1 style=\"font-family: Poppins; font-weight: 700; font-size: 62px; line-height: 1.08; margin: 26px auto 0; max-width: 840px; color: #36324F; letter-spacing: -0.01em\">Drop a pebble,<br>find your people.<\u002Fh1>\n      <p style=\"font-size: 19px; line-height: 1.6; color: #5E5872; max-width: 600px; margin: 24px auto 0;\">Put a small, low‑stakes pebble out into the world — a coffee, a slow walk, a tan day, a weekend trip — and see who wants to come along. No events to plan. No pressure. Just real life, with new friends.<\u002Fp>\n      <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; margin-top: 34px;\">\n        <a onclick=\"{{ goBrowse }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; padding: 15px 30px; border-radius: 999px;\">Browse pebbles<\u002Fa>\n        <a onclick=\"{{ goPost }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: #36324F; font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.3);\">Drop a pebble<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsection>\n\n    <section style=\"max-width: 1120px; margin: 30px auto 0; padding: 0 40px;\">\n      <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px;\">\n        <div style=\"position: relative; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; background: #5E7457; min-height: 230px;\">\n          <div style=\"position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: url(&quot;0dd0789a-8f7a-45a7-98cc-0b5ea8ed6384&quot;); background-size: cover; background-position: center; opacity: 0.32;\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(46,58,42,0.92), rgba(46,58,42,0.18));\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: relative; padding: 22px; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; color: #F4F2E8;\">\n            <span style=\"align-self: flex-start; background: #DCE7D8; color: #4E6249; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;\">Open to all<\u002Fspan>\n            <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.2; margin: 12px 0 4px;\">Slow morning coffee<\u002Fp>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.85; margin: 0;\">Maya · Sat 10am · Hayes Valley<\u002Fp>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"position: relative; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; background: #B5694A; min-height: 230px;\">\n          <div style=\"position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: url(&quot;93c1353c-4ec3-46e9-8a22-b9bd6a1e9e89&quot;); background-size: cover; background-position: center; opacity: 0.32;\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(108,62,44,0.93), rgba(108,62,44,0.18));\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: relative; padding: 22px; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; color: #FBEFE6;\">\n            <span style=\"align-self: flex-start; background: #F9DECE; color: #BE6B45; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;\">Women only<\u002Fspan>\n            <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.2; margin: 12px 0 4px;\">Tan + swim<\u002Fp>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.85; margin: 0;\">Priya · Sun 1pm · Baker Beach<\u002Fp>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"position: relative; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; background: #5C63A6; min-height: 230px;\">\n          <div style=\"position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: url(&quot;6fa40fee-d86a-4383-8860-4ba9df04c27e&quot;); background-size: cover; background-position: center; opacity: 0.30;\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(58,62,108,0.93), rgba(58,62,108,0.18));\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: relative; padding: 22px; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; color: #F0F1FA;\">\n            <span style=\"align-self: flex-start; background: #DEE0F3; color: #5C63A6; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;\">Men only<\u002Fspan>\n            <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.2; margin: 12px 0 4px;\">Pints after work<\u002Fp>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.85; margin: 0;\">Daniel · Fri 6pm · The Page<\u002Fp>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsection>\n\n    <section style=\"max-width: 760px; margin: 90px auto 0; padding: 0 40px; text-align: center;\">\n      <p style=\"font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: #5E7457; letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin: 0;\">So, what's a <b>Pebble<\u002Fb>?<\u002Fp>\n      <h2 style=\"font-family: Poppins; font-weight: 700; font-size: 38px; color: #36324F; margin: 12px 0 0; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.12\">A small thing you toss out to see who shows up.<\u002Fh2>\n      <p style=\"font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.65; color: #5E5872; margin: 22px 0 0;\">You don't need a grand plan to make friends - but ordinary and regular plans. A pebble is exactly that. You're not organising an event or committing to anything. You're just saying <em style=\"color: rgb(54, 50, 79); font-style: normal; font-weight: 800;\">\"I was planning to do this - anyone want to join?\"<\u002Fem> and letting a friendship start from there.<\u002Fp>\n    <\u002Fsection>\n\n    <section style=\"max-width: 1000px; margin: 70px auto 0; padding: 0 40px;\">\n      <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 22px;\">\n        <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px 32px; border: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.1);\">\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #BE6B45; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 16px;\">Pebble is not<\u002Fp>\n          <ul style=\"list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;\">\n            <li style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #5E5872;\">— A dating or hookup app<\u002Fli>\n            <li style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #5E5872;\">— Networking or \"professional connections\"<\u002Fli>\n            <li style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #5E5872;\">— Big ticketed events to organise<\u002Fli>\n            <li style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #5E5872;\">— Another feed to scroll endlessly<\u002Fli>\n          <\u002Ful>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"background: #C7D6C2; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px 32px; border: 1px solid rgba(94,116,87,0.3);\">\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #4E6249; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 16px;\">Pebble is<\u002Fp>\n          <ul style=\"list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;\">\n            <li style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #3C4633;\">— Spontaneous, real‑world pebbles<\u002Fli>\n            <li style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #3C4633;\">— A way to meet new friends, no awkward social media posts<\u002Fli>\n            <li style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #3C4633;\">— Optional women‑only / men‑only spaces<\u002Fli>\n            <li style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #3C4633;\">— Less screens, more real life&nbsp;<\u002Fli>\n          <\u002Ful>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsection>\n\n    <section style=\"max-width: 1120px; margin: 90px auto; padding: 0 40px; text-align: center;\">\n      <h2 style=\"font-family: Poppins; font-weight: 700; font-size: 38px; color: #36324F; margin: 0; letter-spacing: -0.01em\">How it works<\u002Fh2>\n      <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 20px; margin-top: 36px;\">\n        <div style=\"text-align: left;\">\n          <div style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 34px; color: #8E95C9;\">01<\u002Fdiv>\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 17px; margin: 8px 0 4px; color: #36324F;\">Drop a pebble<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #5E5872; margin: 0;\">Say what you're doing and when - coffee, a walk, a beach day. Add details and preferences.<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align: left;\">\n          <div style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 34px; color: #8E95C9;\">02<\u002Fdiv>\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 17px; margin: 8px 0 4px; color: #36324F;\">People ask to join<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #5E5872; margin: 0;\">Anyone nearby who likes the sound of it taps \"ask to join.\" You see who they are first.<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align: left;\">\n          <div style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 34px; color: #8E95C9;\">03<\u002Fdiv>\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 17px; margin: 8px 0 4px; color: #36324F;\">You say yes<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #5E5872; margin: 0;\">Approve who comes along. No pressure to host or entertain - you're just hanging out.<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align: left;\">\n          <div style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 34px; color: #8E95C9;\">04<\u002Fdiv>\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 17px; margin: 8px 0 4px; color: #36324F;\">You show up<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #5E5872; margin: 0;\">Meet in real life. Maybe it's a one‑off, maybe it's the start of a real friendship.<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <a onclick=\"{{ goHow }}\" style=\"display: inline-block; margin-top: 38px; cursor: pointer; color: #36324F; font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; border-bottom: 2px solid #8E95C9; padding-bottom: 2px;\">Read the full guide →<\u002Fa>\n    <\u002Fsection>\n\n    <footer style=\"background: #B9BEE3; padding: 54px 40px; text-align: center;\">\n      <svg width=\"44\" height=\"44\" viewBox=\"0 0 40 40\" fill=\"none\" style=\"margin-bottom: 14px;\" aria-label=\"Pebble logo\">\n        <ellipse cx=\"20\" cy=\"29\" rx=\"16\" ry=\"5.5\" stroke=\"#36324F\" stroke-width=\"1.7\" opacity=\"0.4\"><\u002Fellipse>\n        <ellipse cx=\"20\" cy=\"29\" rx=\"10.5\" ry=\"3.6\" stroke=\"#36324F\" stroke-width=\"1.7\" opacity=\"0.6\"><\u002Fellipse>\n        <ellipse cx=\"20\" cy=\"29\" rx=\"5\" ry=\"1.8\" stroke=\"#36324F\" stroke-width=\"1.7\" opacity=\"0.85\"><\u002Fellipse>\n        <circle cx=\"20\" cy=\"11.5\" r=\"5.2\" fill=\"#36324F\"><\u002Fcircle>\n      <\u002Fsvg>\n      <p style=\"font-family: Poppins; font-weight: 700; font-size: 28px; color: #36324F; margin: 0 auto; letter-spacing: -0.01em; max-width: 700px; line-height: 1.18\">Social media made us lonelier than ever. Pebble is a small way back.<\u002Fp>\n      <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: rgba(54,50,79,0.62); margin: 16px 0 0;\">Pebble - to make the world social again<\u002Fp>\n    <\u002Ffooter>\n  <\u002Fmain>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- ===================== HOW IT WORKS ===================== -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isHow }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n  <main data-screen-label=\"How it works\" style=\"max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 64px 40px 90px;\">\n    <p style=\"font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: #5E7457; margin: 0;\">The full guide<\u002Fp>\n    <h1 style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 48px; color: #36324F; margin: 8px 0 0; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.01em;\">How Pebble works<\u002Fh1>\n    <p style=\"font-size: 19px; line-height: 1.65; color: #5E5872; margin: 20px 0 0;\">It's deliberately simple. The whole point is to lower the barrier to seeing people — so there's almost nothing to learn.<\u002Fp>\n\n    <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 22px; margin-top: 44px;\">\n      <sc-for list=\"{{ steps }}\" as=\"s\" hint-placeholder-count=\"4\">\n        <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 22px; background: #F6EEDF; border: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.1); border-radius: 18px; padding: 26px 28px;\">\n          <div style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 36px; color: #8E95C9; line-height: 1; min-width: 54px;\">{{ s.n }}<\u002Fdiv>\n          <div>\n            <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 19px; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 6px;\">{{ s.title }}<\u002Fp>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: #5E5872; margin: 0;\">{{ s.body }}<\u002Fp>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-for>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <h2 style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 30px; color: #36324F; margin: 56px 0 0; letter-spacing: -0.01em;\">Staying comfortable &amp; safe<\u002Fh2>\n    <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 18px; margin-top: 22px;\">\n      <div style=\"background: #DCE7D8; border-radius: 16px; padding: 22px 24px;\">\n        <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 6px;\">Women‑only &amp; men‑only<\u002Fp>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #3C4633; margin: 0;\">Every pebble can be set to open, women‑only or men‑only — so you can choose the space that feels right.<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"background: #DEE0F3; border-radius: 16px; padding: 22px 24px;\">\n        <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 6px;\">You approve who joins<\u002Fp>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #3E4270; margin: 0;\">Nobody just turns up. You see a short profile and approve each person before anything's confirmed.<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"background: #DEE0F3; border-radius: 16px; padding: 22px 24px;\">\n        <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 6px;\">Public places first<\u002Fp>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #3E4270; margin: 0;\">Pebbles happen in cafés, parks and beaches — friendly, public spots by design.<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"background: #DCE7D8; border-radius: 16px; padding: 22px 24px;\">\n        <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 6px;\">Easy to step back<\u002Fp>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #3C4633; margin: 0;\">No shows, no pressure. Cancel or leave a pebble any time, no awkwardness owed.<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <h2 style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 30px; color: #36324F; margin: 56px 0 18px; letter-spacing: -0.01em;\">Questions people ask<\u002Fh2>\n    <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column;\">\n      <sc-for list=\"{{ faqs }}\" as=\"f\" hint-placeholder-count=\"4\">\n        <div style=\"border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.16); padding: 20px 0;\">\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 18px; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 6px;\">{{ f.q }}<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: #5E5872; margin: 0;\">{{ f.a }}<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-for>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <div style=\"text-align: center; margin-top: 50px;\">\n      <a onclick=\"{{ goPost }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; padding: 15px 32px; border-radius: 999px;\">Drop your first pebble<\u002Fa>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fmain>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- ===================== BROWSE ===================== -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isBrowse }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n  <main data-screen-label=\"Browse\" style=\"max-width: 1160px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 56px 40px 90px;\">\n    <sc-if value=\"{{ justPosted }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n      <div style=\"background: #DCE7D8; border: 1px solid #8FB08C; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px 22px; margin-bottom: 26px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;\">\n        <div style=\"width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 32% 30%, #9FBE9A, #5E7457);\"><\u002Fdiv>\n        <p style=\"margin: 0; color: #36324F; font-weight: 700;\">Your pebble is live — it's at the top of the list below. See who shows up.<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n    <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px;\">\n      <div>\n        <h1 style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 44px; color: #36324F; margin: 0; letter-spacing: -0.01em;\">Open pebbles near you<\u002Fh1>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 17px; color: #5E5872; margin: 8px 0 0;\">{{ resultCount }} pebbles waiting for someone to join.<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <a onclick=\"{{ goPost }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; padding: 13px 24px; border-radius: 999px;\">+ Drop a pebble<\u002Fa>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <div style=\"margin-top: 30px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px;\">\n      <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n        <sc-for list=\"{{ genderFilters }}\" as=\"g\" hint-placeholder-count=\"4\">\n          <div onclick=\"{{ g.onClick }}\" style=\"{{ g.style }}\">{{ g.label }}<\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fsc-for>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n        <sc-for list=\"{{ activityFilters }}\" as=\"a\" hint-placeholder-count=\"6\">\n          <div onclick=\"{{ a.onClick }}\" style=\"{{ a.style }}\">{{ a.label }}<\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fsc-for>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n        <sc-for list=\"{{ cityFilters }}\" as=\"c\" hint-placeholder-count=\"4\">\n          <div onclick=\"{{ c.onClick }}\" style=\"{{ c.style }}\">{{ c.label }}<\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fsc-for>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <sc-if value=\"{{ hasResults }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n    <div style=\"margin-top: 32px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px;\">\n      <sc-for list=\"{{ cards }}\" as=\"h\" hint-placeholder-count=\"6\">\n        <div onclick=\"{{ h.onOpen }}\" style=\"position: relative; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; background: #36324F; min-height: 340px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; cursor: pointer;\">\n          <div style=\"{{ h.bg }}\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(46,42,66,0.95) 12%, rgba(46,42,66,0.16));\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: relative; padding: 22px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; color: #F4F1EA;\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 8px;\">\n              <span style=\"{{ h.badgeStyle }}\">{{ h.badgeLabel }}<\u002Fspan>\n              <span style=\"background: rgba(244,241,234,0.18); color: #F4F1EA; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;\">{{ h.activity }}<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.15; margin: 16px 0 0;\">{{ h.title }}<\u002Fp>\n            <div style=\"margin-top: auto; padding-top: 16px;\">\n              <p style=\"font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; margin: 0 0 2px;\">{{ h.meta }}<\u002Fp>\n              <p style=\"font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.7; margin: 0 0 16px;\">{{ h.host }}<\u002Fp>\n              <div onclick=\"{{ h.onJoin }}\" style=\"{{ h.joinStyle }}\">{{ h.joinLabel }}<\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-for>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsc-if>\n    <sc-if value=\"{{ noResults }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n      <div style=\"margin-top: 50px; text-align: center; padding: 60px 20px; background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 20px;\">\n        <p style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 26px; color: #36324F; margin: 0; letter-spacing: -0.01em;\">No pebbles match that yet.<\u002Fp>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: #5E5872; margin: 10px 0 22px;\">Be the one to start something — drop your own.<\u002Fp>\n        <a onclick=\"{{ goPost }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; padding: 13px 26px; border-radius: 999px;\">Drop a pebble<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsc-if>\n  <\u002Fmain>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- ===================== DETAIL ===================== -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isDetail }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n  <main data-screen-label=\"Pebble detail\" style=\"max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 0 90px;\">\n    <div style=\"position: relative; height: 320px; border-radius: 0 0 28px 28px; overflow: hidden; background: #36324F;\">\n      <div style=\"{{ detail.bg }}\"><\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(46,42,66,0.96) 10%, rgba(46,42,66,0.2));\"><\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 28px 36px;\">\n        <a onclick=\"{{ goBrowse }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: rgba(243,238,221,0.75); font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 14px;\">← Back to browse<\u002Fa>\n        <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">\n          <span style=\"{{ detail.badgeStyle }}\">{{ detail.badgeLabel }}<\u002Fspan>\n          <span style=\"background: rgba(243,238,221,0.18); color: #F3EEDD; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;\">{{ detail.activity }}<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <h1 style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 38px; color: #F3EEDD; margin: 0; line-height: 1.1;\">{{ detail.title }}<\u002Fh1>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <div style=\"padding: 32px 36px 0;\">\n      <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;\">\n        <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px 18px;\">\n          <p style=\"font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #8A82A0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em; margin: 0 0 4px;\">When<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0; font-size: 16px;\">{{ detail.when }}<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px 18px;\">\n          <p style=\"font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #8A82A0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em; margin: 0 0 4px;\">Where<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0; font-size: 16px;\">{{ detail.place }}, {{ detail.city }}<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px 18px;\">\n          <p style=\"font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #8A82A0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em; margin: 0 0 4px;\">Group size<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0; font-size: 16px;\">{{ detail.size }}<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <sc-if value=\"{{ detail.hasDesc }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n        <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 16px; padding: 18px 22px; margin-bottom: 18px;\">\n          <p style=\"font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #8A82A0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em; margin: 0 0 6px;\">About this pebble<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: #36324F; margin: 0;\">{{ detail.desc }}<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-if>\n      <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 18px; padding: 22px 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;\">\n        <div style=\"width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 32% 30%, #C9CFEE, #8E95C9); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 26px; color: #F4F1EA; flex-shrink: 0;\">{{ detail.hostInitial }}<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"flex: 1;\">\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 18px; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 2px;\">{{ detail.host }}<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #5E5872; margin: 0 0 8px;\">{{ detail.hostBio }}<\u002Fp>\n          <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n            <sc-for list=\"{{ detail.hostInterests }}\" as=\"i\" hint-placeholder-count=\"3\">\n              <span style=\"background: #DEE0F3; color: #5C63A6; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;\">{{ i }}<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fsc-for>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <sc-if value=\"{{ detail.isHost }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n        <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 18px; padding: 24px;\">\n          <p style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 18px; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 4px;\">{{ detail.requestCount }} asked to join<\u002Fp>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #5E7457; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 16px;\">{{ detail.approvedCount }} approved<\u002Fp>\n          <sc-if value=\"{{ detail.hasRequesters }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;\">\n              <sc-for list=\"{{ detail.requesters }}\" as=\"r\" hint-placeholder-count=\"2\">\n                <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; background: #FBF4EA; border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px 16px;\">\n                  <div style=\"width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 32% 30%, #C9CFEE, #8E95C9); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 800; font-size: 18px; color: #F4F1EA; flex-shrink: 0;\">{{ r.initial }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                  <div style=\"flex: 1;\">\n                    <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 2px;\">{{ r.name }}<\u002Fp>\n                    <p style=\"font-size: 13px; color: #5E5872; margin: 0 0 6px;\">{{ r.bio }}<\u002Fp>\n                    <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n                      <sc-for list=\"{{ r.interests }}\" as=\"ri\" hint-placeholder-count=\"2\">\n                        <span style=\"background: #DEE0F3; color: #5C63A6; padding: 2px 9px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700;\">{{ ri }}<\u002Fspan>\n                      <\u002Fsc-for>\n                    <\u002Fdiv>\n                  <\u002Fdiv>\n                  <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;\">\n                    <div onclick=\"{{ r.onApprove }}\" style=\"{{ r.approveStyle }}\">{{ r.approveLabel }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                    <div onclick=\"{{ r.onDecline }}\" style=\"{{ r.declineStyle }}\">{{ r.declineLabel }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                  <\u002Fdiv>\n                <\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fsc-for>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-if>\n          <sc-if value=\"{{ detail.noRequesters }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: #8A82A0; margin: 0;\">Nobody has asked to join yet.<\u002Fp>\n          <\u002Fsc-if>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-if>\n      <sc-if value=\"{{ detail.isNotHost }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n        <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #8A82A0; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 12px;\">{{ detail.interestedCount }} people interested<\u002Fp>\n        <div onclick=\"{{ detail.onJoin }}\" style=\"{{ detail.joinBigStyle }}\">{{ detail.joinLabel }}<\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-if>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fmain>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- ===================== POST ===================== -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isPost }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n  <main data-screen-label=\"Post\" style=\"max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 60px 40px 90px;\">\n    <p style=\"font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: #5E7457; margin: 0;\">Toss it out there<\u002Fp>\n    <h1 style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 46px; color: #36324F; margin: 8px 0 0; letter-spacing: -0.01em;\">Drop a pebble<\u002Fh1>\n    <p style=\"font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.6; color: #5E5872; margin: 16px 0 0;\">You're not committing to host anything. Just say what you're doing and when — someone out there is hoping to join.<\u002Fp>\n\n    <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.12); border-radius: 22px; padding: 32px; margin-top: 34px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 26px;\">\n      <div>\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 8px;\">What's the pebble?<\u002Flabel>\n        <select value=\"{{ pActivity }}\" onchange=\"{{ onActivity }}\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; padding: 13px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F; appearance: none; cursor: pointer;\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ activityOptions }}\" as=\"o\" hint-placeholder-count=\"10\">\n            <option value=\"{{ o.value }}\">{{ o.label }}<\u002Foption>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fselect>\n        <sc-if value=\"{{ showCustomActivity }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n          <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px;\">\n            <input value=\"{{ customActivity }}\" onchange=\"{{ onCustomActivity }}\" placeholder=\"e.g. Pottery class, dog walk, sunrise hike…\" style=\"flex: 1; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F;\">\n            <div onclick=\"{{ onAddActivity }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px 18px; border-radius: 12px; white-space: nowrap;\">Add<\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fsc-if>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div>\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Say it in your own words<\u002Flabel>\n        <input value=\"{{ pTitle }}\" onchange=\"{{ onTitle }}\" placeholder=\"e.g. Slow sunset walk\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F;\">\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div>\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Add a description <span style=\"font-weight: 500; color: #8A82A0;\">(optional)<\u002Fspan><\u002Flabel>\n        <textarea value=\"{{ pDesc }}\" onchange=\"{{ onDesc }}\" placeholder=\"Any extra details — what to bring, where exactly to meet, what vibe to expect…\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; padding: 13px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F; resize: vertical; min-height: 72px; line-height: 1.5;\"><\u002Ftextarea>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 14px;\">\n        <div>\n          <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Date<\u002Flabel>\n          <input type=\"date\" value=\"{{ pDate }}\" onchange=\"{{ onDate }}\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; padding: 13px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F;\">\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div>\n          <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Time<\u002Flabel>\n          <input type=\"time\" value=\"{{ pTime }}\" onchange=\"{{ onTime }}\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; padding: 13px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F;\">\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div>\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Location<\u002Flabel>\n        <input value=\"{{ pWhere }}\" onchange=\"{{ onWhere }}\" placeholder=\"e.g. Hayes Valley, Shoreditch, Le Marais…\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F;\">\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div>\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 12px;\">How many people?<\u002Flabel>\n        <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ postSizeChips }}\" as=\"s\" hint-placeholder-count=\"5\">\n            <div onclick=\"{{ s.onClick }}\" style=\"{{ s.style }}\">{{ s.label }}<\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div>\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 8px;\">City<\u002Flabel>\n        <input value=\"{{ pCity }}\" onchange=\"{{ onCity }}\" placeholder=\"San Francisco\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F;\">\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div>\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin-bottom: 12px;\">Who's it open to?<\u002Flabel>\n        <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ postGenderChips }}\" as=\"g\" hint-placeholder-count=\"3\">\n            <div onclick=\"{{ g.onClick }}\" style=\"{{ g.style }}\">{{ g.label }}<\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <button onclick=\"{{ onDrop }}\" style=\"margin-top: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 17px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 14px; border: none;\">Drop the pebble 🪨<\u002Fbutton>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fmain>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- ===================== PROFILE ===================== -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isProfile }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n  <main data-screen-label=\"Profile\" style=\"max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 56px 40px 90px;\">\n    <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.12); border-radius: 22px; padding: 28px 30px;\">\n      <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; margin-bottom: 20px;\">\n        <div style=\"position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer;\" onclick=\"{{ onAvatarClick }}\">\n          <div style=\"{{ avatarStyle }}\">{{ avatarInitial }}<\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"position: absolute; bottom: 0; right: 0; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; background: #36324F; border: 2px solid #F6EEDF; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\">\n            <svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"8\" cy=\"9\" r=\"3\" stroke=\"#F3EEDD\" stroke-width=\"1.4\"><\u002Fcircle><path d=\"M5.5 3.5 5 4.5H2.5a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v7a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h11a1 1 0 0 0 1-1v-7a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H11l-.5-1h-5Z\" stroke=\"#F3EEDD\" stroke-width=\"1.3\" fill=\"none\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n          <input type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" onchange=\"{{ onAvatarChange }}\" id=\"avatar-input\" style=\"display: none;\">\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"flex: 1;\">\n          <sc-if value=\"{{ editingName }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n            <input value=\"{{ profileName }}\" onchange=\"{{ onNameChange }}\" onblur=\"{{ onNameBlur }}\" autofocus=\"{{ true }}\" style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 26px; color: #36324F; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid #8E95C9; background: transparent; outline: none; width: 100%; padding: 2px 0; letter-spacing: -0.02em;\">\n          <\u002Fsc-if>\n          <sc-if value=\"{{ notEditingName }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n            <h1 onclick=\"{{ onEditName }}\" style=\"font-weight: 900; font-size: 28px; color: #36324F; margin: 0; letter-spacing: -0.02em; cursor: text;\" title=\"Click to edit your name\">{{ profileName }}<\u002Fh1>\n          <\u002Fsc-if>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: #5E5872; margin: 4px 0 0;\">San Francisco<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div>\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Your bio<\u002Flabel>\n        <textarea value=\"{{ profileBio }}\" onchange=\"{{ onBio }}\" placeholder=\"Tell people a little about you — what you're into, what kind of hangouts you love...\" style=\"width: 100%; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F; resize: vertical; min-height: 80px; line-height: 1.5;\"><\u002Ftextarea>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"margin-top: 18px;\">\n        <label style=\"display: block; font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 10px;\">Your interests<\u002Flabel>\n        <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ interestChips }}\" as=\"ic\" hint-placeholder-count=\"8\">\n            <div onclick=\"{{ ic.onClick }}\" style=\"{{ ic.style }}\">{{ ic.label }}<\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px;\">\n          <input value=\"{{ customInterest }}\" onchange=\"{{ onCustomInterest }}\" placeholder=\"Add your own…\" style=\"flex: 1; font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 9px 14px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.22); background: #FBF4EA; color: #36324F;\">\n          <div onclick=\"{{ onAddCustomInterest }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 999px;\">Add<\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px; margin-top: 18px;\">\n      <div style=\"background: #C7D6C2; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px 22px; text-align: center;\">\n        <p style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 34px; color: #36324F; margin: 0;\">{{ statPosted }}<\u002Fp>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #4E6249; margin: 2px 0 0; font-weight: 700;\">Pebbles dropped<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"background: #D7DAF0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px 22px; text-align: center;\">\n        <p style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 34px; color: #36324F; margin: 0;\">{{ statJoined }}<\u002Fp>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #5C63A6; margin: 2px 0 0; font-weight: 700;\">Pebbles joined<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"background: #F9DECE; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px 22px; text-align: center;\">\n        <p style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 34px; color: #36324F; margin: 0;\">7<\u002Fp>\n        <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #BE6B45; margin: 2px 0 0; font-weight: 700;\">New people met<\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <h2 style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 28px; color: #36324F; margin: 44px 0 16px; letter-spacing: -0.01em;\">Pebbles you've dropped<\u002Fh2>\n    <sc-if value=\"{{ hasPosted }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n      <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;\">\n        <sc-for list=\"{{ postedCards }}\" as=\"h\" hint-placeholder-count=\"2\">\n          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; background: #F6EEDF; border: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.1); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px 20px;\">\n            <div style=\"width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 12px; background-size: cover; background-position: center; flex-shrink: 0; {{ h.thumb }}\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"flex: 1;\">\n              <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 2px;\">{{ h.title }}<\u002Fp>\n              <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #5E5872; margin: 0;\">{{ h.meta }} · {{ h.badgeLabel }}<\u002Fp>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <span style=\"background: #DCE7D8; color: #4E6249; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px;\">Active<\u002Fspan>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fsc-for>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsc-if>\n    <sc-if value=\"{{ noPosted }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n      <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 18px; padding: 36px; text-align: center;\">\n        <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: #5E5872; margin: 0 0 18px;\">You haven't dropped any pebbles yet. It only takes a second.<\u002Fp>\n        <a onclick=\"{{ goPost }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 999px;\">Drop your first pebble<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n    <h2 style=\"font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 28px; color: #36324F; margin: 44px 0 16px; letter-spacing: -0.01em;\">Pebbles you've joined<\u002Fh2>\n    <sc-if value=\"{{ hasJoined }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n      <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;\">\n        <sc-for list=\"{{ joinedCards }}\" as=\"h\" hint-placeholder-count=\"2\">\n          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; background: #F6EEDF; border: 1px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.1); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px 20px;\">\n            <div style=\"width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 12px; background-size: cover; background-position: center; flex-shrink: 0; {{ h.thumb }}\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"flex: 1;\">\n              <p style=\"font-weight: 800; color: #36324F; margin: 0 0 2px;\">{{ h.title }}<\u002Fp>\n              <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #5E5872; margin: 0;\">{{ h.meta }} · with {{ h.host }}<\u002Fp>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <span style=\"background: #D7DAF0; color: #5C63A6; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px;\">You're in<\u002Fspan>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fsc-for>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsc-if>\n    <sc-if value=\"{{ noJoined }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n      <div style=\"background: #F6EEDF; border-radius: 18px; padding: 36px; text-align: center;\">\n        <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: #5E5872; margin: 0 0 18px;\">Nothing joined yet — browse what's happening near you.<\u002Fp>\n        <a onclick=\"{{ goBrowse }}\" style=\"cursor: pointer; background: #36324F; color: #F3EEDD; font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 999px;\">Browse pebbles<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsc-if>\n  <\u002Fmain>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n<\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fx-dc>\n<script type=\"text/x-dc\" data-dc-script=\"\" data-props=\"{&quot;$preview&quot;:{&quot;width&quot;:1180,&quot;height&quot;:860}}\">\nclass Component extends DCLogic {\n  state = {\n    screen: 'home',\n    selectedId: null,\n    fActivity: 'all', fGender: 'all', fCity: 'all',\n    pActivity: 'Coffee', pGender: 'open',\n    pTitle: '', pDesc: '', pDate: '', pTime: '', pWhere: '', pCity: '', pSize: '',\n    customActivity: '', extraActivities: [],\n    justPosted: false,\n    joined: [],\n    extra: [],\n    profileBio: '',\n    profileInterests: [],\n    profileImg: '',\n    profileName: 'Your name',\n    editingName: false,\n    customInterest: '',\n    approvals: {}\n  };\n\n  activities = ['Coffee', 'Beach day', 'Slow walk', 'Board games', 'Weekend trip', 'Lunch', 'Evening drinks', 'Reading'];\n\n  imgMap = {\n    'Coffee': (window.__resources && window.__resources.imgCoffee) || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1495474472287-4d71bcdd2085?w=700&q=80',\n    'Beach day': (window.__resources && window.__resources.imgBeach) || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507525428034-b723cf961d3e?w=700&q=80',\n    'Slow walk': (window.__resources && window.__resources.imgWalk) || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e?w=700&q=80',\n    'Board games': (window.__resources && window.__resources.imgBoardgames) || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1610890716171-6b1bb98ffd09?w=700&q=80',\n    'Weekend trip': (window.__resources && window.__resources.imgWeekendtrip) || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1469474968028-56623f02e42e?w=700&q=80',\n    'Lunch': (window.__resources && window.__resources.imgLunch) || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504674900247-0877df9cc836?w=700&q=80',\n    'Evening drinks': (window.__resources && window.__resources.imgDrinks) || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514362545857-3bc16c4c7d1b?w=700&q=80',\n    'Reading': (window.__resources && window.__resources.imgReading) || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1481627834876-b7833e8f5570?w=700&q=80'\n  };\n\n  genderMeta = {\n    open:  { label: 'Open to all', color: '#4E6249', soft: '#DCE7D8' },\n    girls: { label: 'Women only', color: '#BE6B45', soft: '#F9DECE' },\n    guys:  { label: 'Men only',   color: '#5C63A6', soft: '#DEE0F3' }\n  };\n\n  mockRequesters = {\n    1: [{ name: 'Jess', bio: 'Coffee addict, loves a slow start.', interests: ['Coffee', 'Reading'], approved: null },\n        { name: 'Tom', bio: 'New in the city, looking to meet people.', interests: ['Slow walks', 'Music'], approved: null }],\n    2: [{ name: 'Aisha', bio: 'Beach lover, always up for a swim.', interests: ['Beach days', 'Yoga'], approved: null }],\n    3: [{ name: 'Leo', bio: 'Just moved for work, knows no one yet.', interests: ['Pub quizzes', 'Football'], approved: null },\n        { name: 'Kai', bio: 'Casual pints kind of guy.', interests: ['Cooking', 'Film'], approved: null }],\n    4: [], 5: [], 6: [], 7: [], 8: []\n  };\n\n  base = [\n    { id: 1, host: 'Maya', hostBio: 'Slow mornings, good books, terrible at small talk but great at long chats.', hostInterests: ['Coffee', 'Reading', 'Slow walks'], activity: 'Coffee', title: 'Slow morning coffee', desc: 'Meeting at Sightglass on 7th. I\\'ll be there from 10, no rush to leave. Just bring yourself and your best slow-morning energy.', when: 'Sat 10am', place: 'Hayes Valley', city: 'San Francisco', gender: 'open', size: 'Up to 4' },\n    { id: 2, host: 'Priya', hostBio: 'Beach girl at heart. Looking for people to tan with, no agenda needed.', hostInterests: ['Beach days', 'Swimming', 'Yoga'], activity: 'Beach day', title: 'Tan + swim', desc: 'Baker Beach near the north end. Bring a towel and sunscreen. I\\'ll have snacks. Water is cold but worth it!', when: 'Sun 1pm', place: 'Baker Beach', city: 'San Francisco', gender: 'girls', size: 'Up to 6' },\n    { id: 3, host: 'Daniel', hostBio: 'Just moved here for work, don\\'t know many people yet. Up for casual pints.', hostInterests: ['Pub quizzes', 'Football', 'Cooking'], activity: 'Evening drinks', title: 'Pints after work', desc: 'The Page on Marylebone High Street. No dress code, no agenda — just a pint and some chat. Come for one or stay for three.', when: 'Fri 6pm', place: 'The Page', city: 'London', gender: 'guys', size: 'No cap' },\n    { id: 4, host: 'Lin', hostBio: 'I walk everywhere and I love company. Zero pressure, just good conversation.', hostInterests: ['Walking', 'Photography', 'Coffee'], activity: 'Slow walk', title: 'Golden hour walk', desc: 'Starting at the Lands End trailhead. It\\'s about 3km loop with a stunning view at the end. Slow pace, lots of chat.', when: 'Wed 6pm', place: 'Lands End', city: 'San Francisco', gender: 'open', size: '2' },\n    { id: 5, host: 'Sara', hostBio: 'Board game nerd, very patient teacher. Beginners 100% welcome.', hostInterests: ['Board games', 'Puzzles', 'Cycling'], activity: 'Board games', title: 'Board game night', desc: 'Café Local on Congress Ave. I\\'ll bring Catan and a couple of lighter games. Absolute beginners welcome — I\\'ll teach everything.', when: 'Thu 7pm', place: 'Café Local', city: 'Austin', gender: 'open', size: 'Up to 10' },\n    { id: 6, host: 'Noor', hostBio: 'Weekend adventurer. Love spontaneous day trips, picnics, exploring new spots.', hostInterests: ['Hiking', 'Beach days', 'Travel'], activity: 'Weekend trip', title: 'Coast day trip', desc: 'Taking the ferry to Stinson Beach. I\\'ll book the tickets — just Venmo me your share. Bringing a picnic blanket and way too much food.', when: 'Sat, all day', place: 'Stinson', city: 'San Francisco', gender: 'girls', size: 'Up to 6' },\n    { id: 7, host: 'Omar', hostBio: 'Food lover always looking for someone to try new places with.', hostInterests: ['Food', 'Travel', 'Film'], activity: 'Lunch', title: 'Lunch company downtown', desc: 'Ferry Building marketplace — we can grab something from the stalls and eat outside by the water. Very casual, no booking needed.', when: 'Tue 12:30', place: 'Ferry Building', city: 'London', gender: 'open', size: 'Up to 4' },\n    { id: 8, host: 'Hana', hostBio: 'Quiet in the best way. I bring snacks and a good playlist.', hostInterests: ['Reading', 'Music', 'Art'], activity: 'Reading', title: 'Reading hour in the park', desc: 'By the big oak near the 19th St entrance of Dolores Park. Bring whatever you\\'re reading. We\\'ll read in comfortable silence, then chat after.', when: 'Sun 11am', place: 'Dolores Park', city: 'San Francisco', gender: 'open', size: '2' }\n  ];\n\n  go(screen) {\n    this.setState({ screen, justPosted: false });\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') window.scrollTo(0, 0);\n  }\n\n  openDetail(id) {\n    this.setState({ screen: 'detail', selectedId: id });\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') window.scrollTo(0, 0);\n  }\n\n  toggleJoin(id) {\n    const j = this.state.joined;\n    this.setState({ joined: j.includes(id) ? j.filter(x => x !== id) : [...j, id] });\n  }\n\n  imgFor(a) { return this.imgMap[a] || this.imgMap['Coffee']; }\n\n  navStyle(active) {\n    return {\n      textDecoration: 'none', cursor: 'pointer', fontWeight: 700, fontSize: '15px',\n      paddingBottom: '3px', borderBottom: active ? '2px solid #8E95C9' : '2px solid transparent',\n      color: active ? '#36324F' : '#8A82A0'\n    };\n  }\n\n  chip(active) {\n    return {\n      cursor: 'pointer', padding: '9px 16px', borderRadius: '999px', fontSize: '14px',\n      fontWeight: 700, userSelect: 'none', border: '1.5px solid',\n      background: active ? '#36324F' : 'transparent',\n      color: active ? '#F3EEDD' : '#5E5872',\n      borderColor: active ? '#36324F' : 'rgba(54,50,79,0.25)'\n    };\n  }\n\n  mapCard(h) {\n    const gm = this.genderMeta[h.gender];\n    const img = h.img || this.imgFor(h.activity);\n    const joined = this.state.joined.includes(h.id);\n    return {\n      ...h,\n      img,\n      meta: h.when + ' · ' + h.place + ' · ' + h.city + ' · ' + (h.size || 'Up to 6'),\n      badgeLabel: gm.label,\n      badgeStyle: { background: gm.soft, color: gm.color, padding: '4px 12px', borderRadius: '999px', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 700 },\n      bg: { position: 'absolute', inset: 0, backgroundImage: \"url('\" + img + \"')\", backgroundSize: 'cover', backgroundPosition: 'center', opacity: 0.32 },\n      thumb: { backgroundImage: \"url('\" + img + \"')\" },\n      joined,\n      interestedLabel: (() => { const base = (this.mockRequesters[h.id] || []).length; const total = base + (this.state.joined.includes(h.id) ? 1 : 0); return total === 0 ? 'Be the first to join' : total === 1 ? '1 person interested' : total + ' people interested'; })(),\n      onOpen: () => this.openDetail(h.id),\n      onJoin: (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); this.toggleJoin(h.id); },\n      joinLabel: joined ? \"You're in ✓\" : 'Ask to join',\n      joinStyle: {\n        cursor: 'pointer', textAlign: 'center', fontWeight: 800, fontSize: '15px', padding: '12px', borderRadius: '12px',\n        background: joined ? 'rgba(185,190,227,0.45)' : '#F3EEDD',\n        color: joined ? '#F4F1EA' : '#36324F',\n        border: joined ? '1.5px solid #B9BEE3' : 'none'\n      }\n    };\n  }\n\n  renderVals() {\n    const S = this.state;\n    const all = [...S.extra, ...this.base];\n    const list = all.filter(h =>\n      (S.fActivity === 'all' || h.activity === S.fActivity) &&\n      (S.fGender === 'all' || h.gender === S.fGender) &&\n      (S.fCity === 'all' || h.city === S.fCity)\n    );\n    const cards = list.map(h => this.mapCard(h));\n    const postedCards = S.extra.map(h => this.mapCard(h));\n    const joinedCards = all.filter(h => S.joined.includes(h.id)).map(h => this.mapCard(h));\n\n    const navItems = [\n      { key: 'home', label: 'Home' },\n      { key: 'how', label: 'How it works' },\n      { key: 'browse', label: 'Browse' },\n      { key: 'post', label: 'Drop a pebble' }\n    ].map(n => ({ label: n.label, style: this.navStyle(S.screen === n.key), onClick: () => this.go(n.key) }));\n\n    const genderFilters = [['all', 'Everyone'], ['open', 'Open to all'], ['girls', 'Women only'], ['guys', 'Men only']]\n      .map(([k, l]) => ({ label: l, style: this.chip(S.fGender === k), onClick: () => this.setState({ fGender: k }) }));\n\n    const activityFilters = ['all', ...this.activities]\n      .map(k => ({ label: k === 'all' ? 'Everything' : k, style: this.chip(S.fActivity === k), onClick: () => this.setState({ fActivity: k }) }));\n\n    const cityFilters = ['all', 'San Francisco', 'London', 'Austin']\n      .map(k => ({ label: k === 'all' ? 'Any city' : k, style: this.chip(S.fCity === k), onClick: () => this.setState({ fCity: k }) }));\n\n    const allActivityOptions = [\n      'Coffee', 'Beach day', 'Slow walk', 'Board games', 'Weekend trip',\n      'Lunch', 'Evening drinks', 'Reading', 'Yoga session', 'Gym date',\n      'Pottery class', 'Cooking together', 'Museum visit', 'Picnic',\n      'Dog walk', 'Running / jogging', 'Cycling', 'Movie night',\n      'Sunrise / sunset hike', 'Bookshop browse', 'Farmers market',\n      'Climbing / bouldering', 'Swim / open water', 'Sketching / drawing',\n      ...S.extraActivities\n    ];\n    const activityOptions = [\n      ...allActivityOptions.map(a => ({ value: a, label: a })),\n      { value: '__other__', label: '+ Add your own…' }\n    ];\n    const showCustomActivity = S.pActivity === '__other__' || S.extraActivities.includes(S.pActivity) === false && !allActivityOptions.slice(0, allActivityOptions.length - S.extraActivities.length).includes(S.pActivity);\n    const postActivityChips = allActivityOptions\n      .map(k => ({ label: k, style: this.chip(S.pActivity === k), onClick: () => this.setState({ pActivity: k }) }));\n\n    const postGenderChips = [['open', 'Open to all'], ['girls', 'Women only'], ['guys', 'Men only']]\n      .map(([k, l]) => ({ label: l, style: this.chip(S.pGender === k), onClick: () => this.setState({ pGender: k }) }));\n\n    const postSizeChips = ['2', 'Up to 4', 'Up to 6', 'Up to 10', 'More than 20', 'No cap']\n      .map(k => ({ label: k, style: this.chip(S.pSize === k), onClick: () => this.setState({ pSize: k }) }));\n\n    const steps = [\n      { n: '01', title: 'Drop a pebble', body: 'Pick what you\\u2019re doing \\u2014 coffee, a walk, a beach day, a weekend trip \\u2014 add when and where, and choose open, women\\u2011only or men\\u2011only. That\\u2019s it.' },\n      { n: '02', title: 'People ask to join', body: 'Anyone nearby who likes the sound of it taps \\u201Cask to join.\\u201D You see a short profile of each person before anything\\u2019s decided.' },\n      { n: '03', title: 'You approve who comes', body: 'Say yes to whoever you\\u2019d like along. There\\u2019s no hosting and no entertaining \\u2014 you were doing this anyway.' },\n      { n: '04', title: 'You meet in real life', body: 'Show up, hang out, see how it feels. Maybe it\\u2019s a one\\u2011off, maybe it\\u2019s the start of a proper friendship.' }\n    ];\n\n    const faqs = [\n      { q: 'Is this a dating app?', a: 'No. Pebble is only for making friends. There are no likes, no swiping, and women\\u2011only / men\\u2011only spaces if you want them.' },\n      { q: 'Do I have to host or plan anything?', a: 'Never. A pebble is just something you\\u2019re already doing. You\\u2019re inviting company, not organising an event.' },\n      { q: 'What if nobody joins?', a: 'Then you have a nice coffee or walk on your own \\u2014 no harm done. Most pebbles in active areas get at least one person.' },\n      { q: 'How do you keep it safe?', a: 'You approve everyone who joins, pebbles happen in public places, and you can leave or cancel any time without explanation.' }\n    ];\n\n    const allInterests = ['Coffee', 'Beach days', 'Slow walks', 'Board games', 'Weekend trips', 'Cooking', 'Reading', 'Music', 'Film', 'Art', 'Hiking', 'Yoga', 'Fitness', 'Gym dates', 'Travel', 'Food', 'Photography', 'Cycling', 'Swimming', 'Pub quizzes', ...S.profileInterests.filter(i => !['Coffee', 'Beach days', 'Slow walks', 'Board games', 'Weekend trips', 'Cooking', 'Reading', 'Music', 'Film', 'Art', 'Hiking', 'Yoga', 'Fitness', 'Gym dates', 'Travel', 'Food', 'Photography', 'Cycling', 'Swimming', 'Pub quizzes'].includes(i))];\n    const interestChips = allInterests.map(k => ({\n      label: k,\n      style: {\n        cursor: 'pointer', padding: '8px 14px', borderRadius: '999px', fontSize: '14px',\n        fontWeight: 700, userSelect: 'none', border: '1.5px solid',\n        background: S.profileInterests.includes(k) ? '#36324F' : 'transparent',\n        color: S.profileInterests.includes(k) ? '#F3EEDD' : '#5E5872',\n        borderColor: S.profileInterests.includes(k) ? '#36324F' : 'rgba(54,50,79,0.22)'\n      },\n      onClick: () => {\n        const cur = S.profileInterests;\n        this.setState({ profileInterests: cur.includes(k) ? cur.filter(x => x !== k) : [...cur, k] });\n      }\n    }));\n\n    const rawDetail = all.find(h => h.id === S.selectedId) || all[0];\n    const gm = this.genderMeta[rawDetail.gender];\n    const img = rawDetail.img || this.imgFor(rawDetail.activity);\n    const joined = S.joined.includes(rawDetail.id);\n    const isHost = rawDetail.host === 'You';\n    const baseRequesters = (this.mockRequesters[rawDetail.id] || []);\n    const approvalState = S.approvals[rawDetail.id] || {};\n    const requesters = baseRequesters.map((r, i) => {\n      const key = rawDetail.id + '-' + i;\n      const status = approvalState[key];\n      return {\n        ...r,\n        initial: r.name[0],\n        approveLabel: status === 'approved' ? 'Approved ✓' : 'Approve',\n        declineLabel: status === 'declined' ? 'Declined' : 'Decline',\n        approveStyle: { cursor: 'pointer', fontWeight: 800, fontSize: '13px', padding: '7px 14px', borderRadius: '999px', background: status === 'approved' ? '#DCE7D8' : '#36324F', color: status === 'approved' ? '#4E6249' : '#F3EEDD' },\n        declineStyle: { cursor: 'pointer', fontWeight: 800, fontSize: '13px', padding: '7px 14px', borderRadius: '999px', background: status === 'declined' ? '#F9DECE' : 'transparent', color: status === 'declined' ? '#BE6B45' : '#8A82A0', border: '1.5px solid rgba(54,50,79,0.18)' },\n        onApprove: () => { const a = { ...( S.approvals[rawDetail.id] || {} ), [key]: 'approved' }; this.setState({ approvals: { ...S.approvals, [rawDetail.id]: a } }); },\n        onDecline: () => { const a = { ...( S.approvals[rawDetail.id] || {} ), [key]: 'declined' }; this.setState({ approvals: { ...S.approvals, [rawDetail.id]: a } }); }\n      };\n    });\n    const interestedCount = baseRequesters.length + (joined ? 1 : 0);\n    const detail = {\n      ...rawDetail,\n      bg: { position: 'absolute', inset: 0, backgroundImage: \"url('\" + img + \"')\", backgroundSize: 'cover', backgroundPosition: 'center', opacity: 0.38 },\n      badgeLabel: gm.label,\n      badgeStyle: { background: gm.soft, color: gm.color, padding: '4px 12px', borderRadius: '999px', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 700 },\n      hostInitial: (rawDetail.host || 'A')[0],\n      hostBio: rawDetail.hostBio || 'No bio yet.',\n      hostInterests: rawDetail.hostInterests || [],\n      size: rawDetail.size || 'Open',\n      isHost, isNotHost: !isHost,\n      requesters, requestCount: requesters.length,\n      approvedCount: baseRequesters.filter((_, i) => (approvalState[rawDetail.id + '-' + i] === 'approved')).length,\n      hasRequesters: requesters.length > 0, noRequesters: requesters.length === 0,\n      interestedCount,\n      desc: rawDetail.desc || '',\n      hasDesc: !!(rawDetail.desc),\n      joined,\n      onJoin: () => this.toggleJoin(rawDetail.id),\n      joinLabel: joined ? \"You're in ✓\" : 'Ask to join',\n      joinBigStyle: {\n        cursor: 'pointer', textAlign: 'center', fontWeight: 800, fontSize: '17px',\n        padding: '16px', borderRadius: '14px', marginTop: '8px',\n        background: joined ? '#DCE7D8' : '#36324F',\n        color: joined ? '#4E6249' : '#F3EEDD',\n        border: 'none'\n      }\n    };\n\n    return {\n      isHome: S.screen === 'home', isHow: S.screen === 'how', isBrowse: S.screen === 'browse',\n      isPost: S.screen === 'post', isProfile: S.screen === 'profile', isDetail: S.screen === 'detail',\n      goHome: () => this.go('home'), goHow: () => this.go('how'), goBrowse: () => this.go('browse'),\n      goPost: () => this.go('post'), goProfile: () => this.go('profile'),\n      navItems, genderFilters, activityFilters, cityFilters,\n      postActivityChips, postGenderChips, postSizeChips,\n      activityOptions, showCustomActivity: S.pActivity === '__other__',\n      customActivity: S.customActivity,\n      onActivity: (e) => this.setState({ pActivity: e.target.value }),\n      onCustomActivity: (e) => this.setState({ customActivity: e.target.value }),\n      onAddActivity: () => {\n        const v = S.customActivity.trim();\n        if (!v) return;\n        this.setState({ extraActivities: [...S.extraActivities, v], pActivity: v, customActivity: '' });\n      },\n      cards, postedCards, joinedCards,\n      resultCount: cards.length,\n      hasResults: cards.length > 0, noResults: cards.length === 0,\n      hasPosted: postedCards.length > 0, noPosted: postedCards.length === 0,\n      hasJoined: joinedCards.length > 0, noJoined: joinedCards.length === 0,\n      statPosted: postedCards.length, statJoined: joinedCards.length,\n      justPosted: S.justPosted,\n      steps, faqs,\n      profileName: S.profileName,\n      editingName: S.editingName,\n      notEditingName: !S.editingName,\n      onEditName: () => this.setState({ editingName: true }),\n      onNameChange: (e) => this.setState({ profileName: e.target.value }),\n      onNameBlur: () => this.setState({ editingName: false }),\n      avatarInitial: S.profileImg ? '' : (S.profileName || 'Y')[0].toUpperCase(),\n      avatarStyle: S.profileImg\n        ? { width: '78px', height: '78px', borderRadius: '50%', backgroundImage: \"url('\" + S.profileImg + \"')\", backgroundSize: 'cover', backgroundPosition: 'center', flexShrink: 0 }\n        : { width: '78px', height: '78px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'radial-gradient(circle at 32% 30%, #C9CFEE, #8E95C9)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', fontWeight: 900, fontSize: '32px', color: '#F4F1EA', flexShrink: 0 },\n      onAvatarClick: () => { const el = typeof document !== 'undefined' && document.getElementById('avatar-input'); if (el) el.click(); },\n      onAvatarChange: (e) => {\n        const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];\n        if (!file) return;\n        const reader = new FileReader();\n        reader.onload = (ev) => this.setState({ profileImg: ev.target.result });\n        reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n      },\n      detail, interestChips,\n      customInterest: S.customInterest,\n      onCustomInterest: (e) => this.setState({ customInterest: e.target.value }),\n      onAddCustomInterest: () => {\n        const v = S.customInterest.trim();\n        if (v && !S.profileInterests.includes(v)) {\n          this.setState({ profileInterests: [...S.profileInterests, v], customInterest: '' });\n        }\n      },\n      profileBio: S.profileBio,\n      onBio: (e) => this.setState({ profileBio: e.target.value }),\n      pTitle: S.pTitle, pDesc: S.pDesc, pDate: S.pDate, pTime: S.pTime, pWhere: S.pWhere, pCity: S.pCity,\n      onTitle: (e) => this.setState({ pTitle: e.target.value }),\n      onDesc: (e) => this.setState({ pDesc: e.target.value }),\n      onDate: (e) => this.setState({ pDate: e.target.value }),\n      onTime: (e) => this.setState({ pTime: e.target.value }),\n      onWhere: (e) => this.setState({ pWhere: e.target.value }),\n      onCity: (e) => this.setState({ pCity: e.target.value }),\n      onDrop: () => {\n        const S2 = this.state;\n        const newH = {\n          id: Date.now(),\n          host: 'You',\n          activity: S2.pActivity,\n          title: S2.pTitle ? S2.pTitle : S2.pActivity,\n          desc: S2.pDesc,\n          when: (S2.pDate ? new Date(S2.pDate).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { weekday: 'short', day: 'numeric', month: 'short' }) : 'TBD') + (S2.pTime ? ' ' + S2.pTime : ''),\n          place: S2.pWhere || 'TBD',\n          city: S2.pCity || 'San Francisco',\n          size: S2.pSize,\n          gender: S2.pGender\n        };\n        this.setState({\n          extra: [newH, ...S2.extra],\n          pTitle: '', pDesc: '', pDate: '', pTime: '', pWhere: '', pCity: '', pSize: '', customActivity: '',\n          fActivity: 'all', fGender: 'all', fCity: 'all',\n          screen: 'browse', justPosted: true\n        });\n        if (typeof window !== 'undefined') window.scrollTo(0, 0);\n      }\n    };\n  }\n}\n<\u002Fscript>\n\n\n<\u002Fbody><\u002Fhtml>"
  </script>
</body>
</html>
